topIngredients.name: Resveratrol 3%
topIngredients.benefit: Potent antioxidant that protects against skin aging

topIngredients.name: Ferulic Acid 3%
topIngredients.benefit: Boosts stability of antioxidants and fights free radicals

topIngredients.name: Tocopherol (Vitamin E)
topIngredients.benefit: Nourishes skin and enhances antioxidant activity

verdict: An antioxidant powerhouse at an accessible price for a specialty treatment. The resveratrol-ferulic acid combination offers genuine photoprotective and anti-aging benefits backed by peer-reviewed studies.
